name: Baby Artichoke Calvados Saute
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash, trim and halve artichoke hearts. Store in acidulated water.
2. Sauté 4 ounces of pork in butter until cooked through. Remove from pan and set aside.
3. Sauté 8-10 artichoke halves in the same pan for about 5 minutes, until golden brown.
4. Add apple slices, green onions, garlic, sage, and Calvados (or other apple brandy) to the pan. Toss to combine.
5. Moisten with chicken stock and season with salt.
6. Return the cooked pork to the pan and toss again to coat.
7. Serve on a plate garnished with fresh sage leaves.
